posts.text:
BREAKING: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, who were scheduled to be in Pakistan for peace talks with Iran today, are still in the US.

The plane scheduled for their flight to Pakistan this morning never departed.

Vice President JD Vance is in Washington, DC, as well.

The US-Iran ceasefire expires tomorrow.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
